title: Jump Rope for Fitness - Premium Gym Workout Rope with Adjustable 9-Foot Length, Ideal for Crossfit, Speed Training, Skipping, Boxing and Sports - by Fit2Live
features: PERFORM AND FOCUS BETTER - With ergonomic grips, lightweight handles, an adjustable length, and cable with metal bearings to prevent tangles, Fit2Live's athletic jump rope is a great cardio exercise option.

TRAIN ENDURANCE AND BALANCE - This gym rope is weighted well for adult use in the commercial and home gym; it's designed for jumping at moderate speed and provides good control, striking a balance between light and heavy.

IMPROVE MUSCLE TONE AND BURN OFF FAT - Skip or jump to suit your workout needs. It's a simple item, but when the reps add up and you start to sweat, the professional quality and easy grip can make a big difference toward meeting goals.

PART OF THE FIT2LIVE SYSTEM - Our full line of exercise equipment rounds out your fitness regimen. From ab wheels to balance balls and resistance bands, Fit2Live offers a holistic approach to your physical health.
description: You're most likely to achieve new goals with the right amount of preparation. If incredible endurance and heart health are your goals, then that prep starts with professional quality equipment like this jump rope from Fit2Live. Sized right for teenagers or adult men and women, our adjustable ropes are built to handle everyday use whether used as a warmup or for full-on speed and footwork training. Tone your legs, abdomen, and shoulders in both outdoor and indoor settings; this rope is built to travel, durable enough for even the most committed jumper. Why choose Fit2Live? Superior lightweight cable helps prevent tangles common to braided and beaded ropes, including in storage Aerated rubber handle sleeves make the rope easy to hold on to, even when wet Extremely portable - weighs just ## pounds Suited for users up to 6 feet tall For users with sensitive knees or stiff ankles, we strongly recommend a jumprope mat or yoga mat to soften each landing - your joints will thank you in both the short and long terms, and you may even see higher RPM and calorie burn. Be sure to check out our full product line for more tools to help you bulk up, trim down, or keep the body you have; our quality equipment sees use by personal trainers and gym-goers nationwide. About Us Fit2Live was founded in 2014 with the goal of inspiring others to get into shape and stay fit. In today’s fast-paced world, we need to stay in shape and lead a healthy lifestyle in order to keep up and thrive. We stand by our products and hand pick all the features to best meet each person’s individual needs. We take pride in our efforts to make products that help people stay fit and healthy.
